chunks.text: Technical Reports - Alvin Cheung. LLM-Based Code Translation Needs Formal Compositional Reasoning (EECS-2025-174) Alvin Cheung and Sanjit A. Seshia. Benchmarking Extraction of Structured Data from Templatized Documents (EECS-2025-77) Mawil Hasan. Advancing Large Language Models for Code Using Code-Structure-Aware Methods (EECS-2025-50) Linyuan Gong.

To tile or not to tile, that is the question (EECS-2025-11) Altan Haan, Doru Thom Popovici, Koushik Sen, Costin Iancu and Alvin Cheung. Syntactic Code Search with Sequence-to-Tree Matching (EECS-2024-93) Gabriel Matute, Wode Ni, Titus Barik, Alvin Cheung and Sarah Chasins. Can LLMs Perform Verified Lifting of Code? (EECS-2024-11) Sahil Bhatia, Jie Qiu, Sanjit A. Seshia and Alvin Cheung.

Query Aware Synthetic Data Generation (EECS-2023-124) Zoey Sun. Katara: Synthesizing CRDTs with Verified Lifting (EECS-2023-2) Shadaj Laddad, Conor Power, Mae Milano, Alvin Cheung and Joseph M. Hellerstein. Hydroflow: A Model and Runtime for Distributed Systems Programming (EECS-2021-201) Mingwei Samuel.
